rsi.key_finding: Overbought (RSI >91.87) → +26pp at +6h; momentum continuation across all horizons. rsi_10 similar. rsi_spread_7_14 weaker.
rsi.notes: Pure momentum continuation — no mean-reversion. Contrast with BTC daily where RSI shows mixed intraday/longer-term behavior.

ma.key_finding: ma_cross_10_50 below zero (price < 10MA < 50MA) → +27pp at +24h. ma_ratio_20 >0.025 → +18.5pp at +24h. All signals show momentum continuation.
ma.notes: Price above MA = bullish continuation; below MA = bearish regime but recovers strongly at +24h. ma_ratio_50 weakest.

macd.key_finding: macd_12_26 above >0.0112 → +11.2, +20.5, +20.1, +33.0pp (exceptional all-horizons momentum). Below <-0.01187 → recovery: +10.3, +18.7, +27.2pp at +6h/+12h/+24h.
macd.notes: macd_6_13 also strong (all 4 horizons ≥10pp). macd_histogram noisier — faster histogram (6/13) shows only +3h bearish spike. The MACD line itself is the signal.

roc.key_finding: roc_6 below <-0.029 → +11.8, +10.0pp at +6h/+12h (borderline consecutive). roc_1 and roc_12 no edge. roc_3 only a single-horizon crash signal.
roc.notes: ROC captures some short-horizon recovery from steep drops but not robustly consecutive. MACD and RSI fully dominate momentum space.

volatility.key_finding: Low vol compression is the strongest bearish signal: realized_vol_24 <2.37 → -16.3, -14.3, -30.6, -36.6pp. High vol (>16.87) → +15.4, +20.9pp at +12h/+24h. bb_width_20 mirrors: narrow bands → -26.7, -29.6pp.
volatility.notes: Volatility expansion = bullish continuation; compression = bearish trap. Very clean and consistent pattern across both realized_vol and Bollinger band width.

volume.key_finding: No meaningful edge. Both volume_ratio_12 and volume_ratio_24 produce no rows ≥10pp with n≥50.
volume.notes: Contrasts with BTC daily where volume_ratio_14 showed +16pp at +3d. NASDAQ hourly volume spikes do not predict direction.

vix.key_finding: vix_ret_1 above >0.9% (n=862) → -11.5, -6.7, -5.5pp at +3h/+6h/+12h (huge sample, immediate NASDAQ drop). vix_level >30 → +12.9, +19.9pp at +12h/+24h (recovery). vix_ret_5 below → +9.8, +11.8pp at +3h/+6h.
vix.notes: VIX is the clearest leading indicator: hourly VIX spike = immediate NASDAQ bearish; elevated VIX (>30) = longer-term bullish recovery. vix_ma_ratio_20 below captures short-term bullish when VIX below MA.

treasury.key_finding: tnx_level <3.73 → +21.6, +19.8, +37.2pp at +6h/+12h/+24h (regime signal: low-rate era). tnx_level >4.59 → -11.3pp at +12h. tnx_ma_ratio_20 rising → +17.2, +22.8pp (rates above MA = bullish momentum).
treasury.notes: Captures macro regime (low vs high rates 2024-present). tnx_ret signals are noisy — short-term rate moves don't cleanly predict NASDAQ hourly. Regime-dependent: this data covers only 2024-07 to present.

time_of_day.key_finding: No meaningful edge. Hour of day (ET) does not predict NASDAQ direction above 10pp threshold.
time_of_day.notes: p2→p98 range covers 9am–3pm ET (market hours). No intraday session patterns found.

day_of_week.key_finding: No meaningful edge. Day of week (Mon=0 to Fri=4) does not predict NASDAQ direction above 10pp threshold.
day_of_week.notes: Calendar effects are not present in this dataset's short window (2024-07 to present).
